name: Puerta Set of 2 Wicker Barstools: Cushioned, Swivel, Weather-Resistant - Christopher Knight Home
description: These Christopher Knight Home Puerta 2 Piece Wicker Barstools are ideal for any patio. Complete with two cushions to provide that much extra comfort while seated outside, these chairs are sure to become a staple of your patio. Made with wicker and an iron frame, these chairs will not only hold up against the elements, but will last you for years to come. With their swivel feature you will never miss anything that is going on with these Christopher Knight Home Puerta 2 Piece Wicker Barstools.
